title: pallenis maritima subsp. sericea
intro: Pallenis maritima subsp. sericea is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae, known for its delicate white flowers and silvery-gray leaves. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pallenis maritima subsp. sericea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and are often used to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
